take_garment_from_stack.query: a worker grasps the top light-blue folded garment and removes it from the stack
take_garment_from_stack.prompt:
Event: a worker grasps the top light-blue folded garment and removes it from the stack
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

fold_garment_sides.query: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-blue garment inward and straightens the folded garment on the table
fold_garment_sides.prompt:
Event: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-blue garment inward and straightens the folded garment on the table
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

pick_up_hanger.query: a worker reaches to the pile of black clothes hangers on the left and lifts one black hanger
pick_up_hanger.prompt:
Event: a worker reaches to the pile of black clothes hangers on the left and lifts one black hanger
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
